name: Framework Reveal (Magician)
summary: Named system with N parts. Saves currency. Welsh's LinkedIn Operating System is the canonical example.
pattern: I built [SYSTEM_NAME] to solve [PROBLEM]. Here are the [N] parts:

name: Numbered List + Reframe Close (Magician/Warrior)
summary: N tactical bullets, then a final line that recontextualizes the list. Welsh's most-repeated structure.
pattern: Want to [GOAL]? [N] things I've learned: [LIST] // The real lesson though: [REFRAME]

name: Anti-Advice (Warrior)
summary: Reject common wisdom, replace with your alternative. High comment count.

name: Confession + Lesson (Lover/Magician)
summary: Admit something embarrassing or wrong, extract teaching. Builds trust, high-share.
pattern: [N] years in, I still [EMBARRASSING_ADMISSION]. Here's what it taught me.

name: Hidden Cost / Hidden Tax (Magician)
summary: Name the thing nobody counts. Pattern-recognition flex.
pattern: The hidden cost of [POPULAR_THING] nobody talks about: [INSIGHT]

name: Origin Story Riff (King/Lover)
summary: Retell your origin from a new angle. Identity-cementing. Welsh runs his "$400k job" story this way constantly.
pattern: [N] years ago, [PIVOT_MOMENT]. Here's what that taught me about [PRESENT_TOPIC].

name: Pattern Recognition (Magician)
summary: Observational with authority. The "I keep seeing this" move.
pattern: After [N] [INTERVIEWS_OR_PROJECTS_OR_YEARS], the same pattern keeps showing up: [INSIGHT]

name: Behind-the-Scenes / Public Journal (Lover/King)
summary: How the sausage is actually made. Transparency play.
pattern: Here's what [METRIC] actually looked like in [TIME_PERIOD]: [BREAKDOWN]

name: Mental Model Intro (Magician)
summary: A new lens. Save currency, lower difficulty than full framework.
pattern: Most people think [X]. The better way to think about it: [MENTAL_MODEL].

name: Reassurance (Lover)
pattern: If you're [SPECIFIC_STRUGGLE], you're not behind. You're [REFRAME_CLOSER].

name: X vs Y (Magician/Warrior)
summary: Binary comparison that flatters one side, usually the reader's.

name: Manifesto (King)
summary: Periodic identity-cementing. Low frequency, high impact.
